title: Brasiliorchis phoenicanthera

The genus Brasiliorchis is part of the subfamily Cranichideae, a group of terrestrial orchids. Brasiliorchis phoenicanthera is endemic to Brazil, where it can be found in the states of Bahia and Sergipe. This species is often classified as an epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants for support.
